description_long: This train station features a long, rectangular main building with a flat roof and a low profile, primarily colored in olive green with some red and blue accents. The structure includes a prominent platform area extending from one side, with what appears to be a raised section or possible entrance at one end. The roof is punctuated by a few geometric shapes, possibly skylights or ventilation units, and the surface is mostly smooth with some subtle textural details. There are no visible canopies or large overhangs, and the station's design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements. The station appears to be constructed mainly from concrete or similar materials, with some metallic and glass components. No visible signage, ticket machines, or railway tracks are present in the images.
description: A low-profile, rectangular train station with a flat roof, olive green exterior, and minimal decorative features. The structure includes a platform area and subtle geometric roof details.
description_view_0: The station is seen from a side angle, highlighting the long, flat roof and the platform area extending outward, with a small raised section at one end.
description_view_1: This view shows the platform area more clearly, with the rectangular roof and colored accents visible, and the raised section appearing more prominent.
description_view_2: From this angle, the length of the building and the flatness of the roof are emphasized, with geometric roof features and colored details visible.
description_view_3: The platform and main building are seen from the opposite side, showing the rectangular layout and the distribution of colored accents on the roof.
